validation.summary: Runtime and trusted-spawn run metadata files parse successfully.

controllerChecks: Clean safety tests remained green and no clean path gained service stop, registry removal, project-root deletion, external deletion, or reset behavior.
Direct startManagedTask now records Launchdeck-spawn ownership evidence so locally spawned managed tasks can be cleaned up without hand-authored PID-only proof.
Leader repair aligned trusted global start runId/transactionId with runContext before writing global run records.
Leader repair restored Windows owned stop to non-forced SIGTERM semantics, preserving stop_failed evidence for processes that refuse termination.
Lifecycle ownership tests stayed green after repair, including verified stop/restart, ownership refusals, port_release_timeout, and stop_failed preservation.
Leader process scan found no clean/runtime/lifecycle/recovery fixture processes left after validation.
acceptedResidualRisks: T031 needed a bounded leader repair in src/control-plane/runs.js to preserve trusted-spawn metadata consistency after runtime.js gained local run ids.
Windows-local validation is not a macOS/Linux release claim.
followUpWork: T032 record US5 safe clean join validation in the ledger.
